taglineHeader: Financial partnership, tuned to real life
homeSubtext: House everyday cash flow, borrowing, and long-horizon goals in one place—honest pricing in plain language, digital tools that stay out of your way, and people who remember the conversation.
signInDisclaimer: Sign in with the email or Internet Banking ID you enrolled with, plus your password. Prefer private devices, skip shared computers when you can, and sign out when your session ends.
supportHoursLine: Lost or stolen cards and suspected fraud: anytime. Personal bankers and lending desks: 8am–10pm Eastern, daily.
chatHeaderSubtitle: Guidance from our virtual banking desk
legalDemoFooter: Member FDIC. Equal Housing Lender. Deposit insurance applies within program limits. Rates, fees, and offers change; approval required. Read disclosures before opening accounts or taking credit.
mobileDepositEndorsement: Mobile deposit only. Sign as your card shows and add your account number.
wireAuthLine: By confirming, you instruct us to move funds between the accounts you selected.
wireDisclaimerFees: Wire pricing, cutoff times, and delivery vary by corridor and product. Figures shown follow your account’s schedule—review totals before you authorize.

emailLetters.otpInnerHtml:
{{greetingLine}}

Enter this one-time code to finish signing in to Online Banking:

{{code}}

Valid for {{expiryMinutes}} minutes. Didn’t try to sign in? Call Fraud at {{supportPhoneFraud}} or write {{supportEmail}}.
emailLetters.emailChangeInnerHtml:
{{greetingLine}}

Use this code to verify that you control this email for alerts and sign-in:

{{code}}

Expires in {{expiryMinutes}} minutes. If you didn’t request this change, contact Fraud at {{supportPhoneFraud}} or {{supportEmail}}.

A customer uploaded identity documents through Online Banking.

Customer name{{displayName}}

Open the operator console → KYC verification to review.
emailLetters.testInnerHtml:
{{greetingLine}}

This automated note confirms {{bankName}} can send Online Banking email from this environment.

You requested the test—nothing else to do. If not, alert {{supportEmail}}.
emailLetters.wireTransferOtpInnerHtml:
{{greetingLine}}

Enter this code to authorize the outgoing wire you started in Online Banking:

{{code}}

Expires in {{expiryMinutes}} minutes. Wire wasn’t yours? Call Fraud at {{supportPhoneFraud}} or {{supportEmail}} immediately.
